author: Disney Channel YouTube
text:
Miley Paints over Hannah Montana's Billboard Zit! 😆🖌️ | Hannah Montana Throwback | @disneychannel
Watch a clip from Hannah Montana Season 1 Episode 13, "You're So Vain, You Probably Think This Zit is About You". Hannah Montana is anxious to unveil her first major billboard campaign.

Watch the next Hannah Montana video here: https://youtu.be/FqxKXY08pN8

Available on Disney+
https://shows.disney.com/hannah-montana

Watch more Hannah Montana videos here: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6R6yXKSLYDY0yMFw36XjhK5mBZWlW9t&si=0L5gyjaGNkkCJeul

Miley Stewart (Miley Cyrus) is a teenager living a secret double life as an average schoolgirl by day and as the famous recording artist Hannah Montana by night!

author: Disney Channel YouTube
text:
